sourceAmbiguity: Multiple cards could compete for the primary action on the authenticated home.
decisionTaken: The route renders exactly one spotlight primary action from PatientSpotlightDecisionProjection.singleDominantAction.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The home attention model stays calm and authoritative while supporting cards remain secondary.
operationalRisk: Parallel cards could introduce their own primary CTAs.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Any future primary CTA must be selected by the spotlight projection or rendered as secondary.
